mapper.select: SELECT stck_shrn_iscd, hts_kor_isnm, stck_prpr, prdy_ctrt, prdy_vrss_sign FROM HC_stock_daily1 WHERE stck_shrn_iscd IS NOT NULL AND hts_kor_isnm IS NOT NULL AND hts_kor_isnm != ''

SELECT stck_bsop_date, stck_oprc, stck_hgpr, stck_lwpr, stck_clpr FROM
HC_stock_weekly2 HC_stock_monthly2 HC_stock_daily2
WHERE stck_shrn_iscd = #{code} ORDER BY stck_bsop_date ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CONCAT(stck_bsop_date, ' ', stck_cntg_hour) AS stck_bsop_date, stck_cntg_hour, stck_oprc, stck_hgpr, stck_lwpr, stck_prpr AS stck_clpr FROM
HC_stock_minute2 HC_stock_hourly
WHERE ticker = #{code} ORDER BY stck_bsop_date DESC, stck_cntg_hour DESC limit
100 50
) AS subquery ORDER BY stck_bsop_date ASC, stck_cntg_hour ASC
